name: ppt-master
tagline: Routes PPTX generation, templating, filling, and enhancement workflows through gated sub-procedures.
verdict: Well-structured router: explicit blocking gates, deterministic routing, and failure-recovery guidance; no security issues found in this file. It depends on external workflow/reference files not included in this content, so full output-contract and reference-resolution checks are unverifiable. Lacks negative-trigger scope and a versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope guidance anywhere despite the skill covering four distinct routes.
Router defers the concrete deliverable format to child route files (e.g. mentions design_spec.md headings) without stating the contract itself here.
References workflows/routing.md, generate-pptx.md, create-template.md, template-fill-pptx.md, native-enhance-pptx.md, and references/<filename>.md, none of which were available to verify existence.
